title: Recognition Risk
hook: Pebble is at risk of being recognized, tracked, or sold out by somebody from an older dangerous orbit.
playerSummary: Old contacts, watchers, or checkpoint-linked enemies may identify Pebble and turn that into leverage.
gmTruth: Use this when Pebble's past catches up, especially through handlers, informants, or anyone who can connect the checkpoint incident to Dragon's Breath operations.
